title: Unit 01 is self aware What about 1 2 and 16
display_title: Unit 01 is self aware What about 1 2 and 16
wikitext:
[]: "Unit 01 is self-aware!" What about 1, 2 & 16?             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 7:49 am In episode 19 Ritsuko says that Unit 01 has become self aware whilst she fights Zeruel. However, wasn't she always self aware? There isn't that much of a difference between what Yui does in episode 19 to episodes 3 and 16 (and 1, sort of). So, what do they mean by "self aware" and how is it different from Yui's stunts before this? Is Ritsuko just spouting nonsense? Did someone make a woopsy in writing/ translating?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 9:15 am She actually says that "she" has "awakened". Dunno how much difference that makes, but I thought this was a bit of an "loldub" moment. :p

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 13, 2011 10:11 am Reichu wrote: She actually says that "she" has "awakened". Dunno how much difference that makes, but I thought this was a bit of an "loldub" moment. :p

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 11:03 am The Eva Monkey wrote: What you're driving at can be answered in one of several ways: 1) Shinji is the main character. That's why his Eva is special. The plot demands it. 2) There's never been a convenient story point for the other Eva units to do wacky shit. 3) Unit-01 is special in that it is the only Evangelion created from Lilith. 4) Magic.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Apr 13, 2011 1:57 pm I interpreted as being a difference between acting unconsciously on maternal instinct and stuff, and Unit 01 coming into full, sentient humanoid awareness and carrying out goals, long-term motivations, and coherent thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:05 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I interpreted as being a difference between acting unconsciously on maternal instinct and stuff, and Unit 01 coming into full, sentient humanoid awareness and carrying out goals, long-term motivations, and coherent thought.

[]:             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: 4) Magic.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:12 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I interpreted as being a difference between acting unconsciously on maternal instinct and stuff, and Unit 01 coming into full, sentient humanoid awareness and carrying out goals, long-term motivations, and coherent thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:41 pm Reichu wrote: It's nothing short of confusing for me why this counts as "awakened" behavior, whereas Eva-01 ripping out of Leliel after Yui has a little chit-chat with Shinji doesn't count.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:54 pm liquidus118 wrote: Care to elaborate? I don't know much about Jung. He's one of the bigger psychologists after Freud's time right?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 13, 2011 3:22 pm Reichu wrote: The zoom-in shot on Shinji is still there in NME.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 13, 2011 3:34 pm Azathoth wrote: Actually it's not entirely clear to me if Shinji even remembers that event afterwards, although admittedly it's been a while since I watched ep 16.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 3:48 pm Azathoth wrote: You sure?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 13, 2011 4:09 pm Reichu wrote: (I keep on wondering if there's some way for an Eva to completely rid herself of the apparent need for a pilot to 'complete the circuit'.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 4:23 pm Azathoth wrote: S2 engine, maybe? Yui's activities in EoE don't seem overly linked to the fact that Shinji is inside.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Apr 13, 2011 4:47 pm Reichu wrote: What about it do you have reservations about?

[]: Re: "Unit 01 is self-aware!" What about 1, 3 &             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 5:53 pm liquidus118 wrote: In episode 19 Ritsuko says that Unit 01 has become self aware whilst she fights Zeruel. However, wasn't she always self aware? There isn't that much of a difference between what Yui does in episode 19 to episodes 3 and 16 (and 1, sort of). So, what do they mean by "self aware" and how is it different from Yui's stunts before this? Is Ritsuko just spouting nonsense? Did someone make a woopsy in writing/ translating?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 13, 2011 6:02 pm TehDonutKing wrote: She had no one inside her.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 6:05 pm Azathoth wrote: Yeah. It's the one occasion of Ritsuko yelling "impossible!" which actually does seem sort of impossible. Is Unit 01 even powered at the time?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Apr 13, 2011 7:11 pm 1, 3, and 16: She's trying, but the armor holds. 19: Success! Also, S2 engine. And yes, post-S2 engine is WTF-land no matter how you look at it.
